data.content: Approved in implementation review. Verified the reviewed state removes any launcher-level 'prompt' command and leaves the exposed CLI commands as start/open/setup/update/stop/restart/status/doctor/uninstall/help only. Confirmed scripts/install.sh and scripts/setup.sh contain no AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md mutation flow, and reran targeted coverage with bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/help-cli.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts (4 tests passed).
